content: My API keeps returning HTTP 429 errors. What should I do?

You have exceeded the rate limit of 100 requests per minute. You should wait 60 seconds before retrying. 

Additionally, the response includes a Retry-After header indicating how many seconds to wait before retrying. If you require higher limits, you can contact support at limits@supportai.com and include your account ID and a description of your use case.
Can you also send me a history of my last few charges?
Last charge was on 49PLN on 1 April 2026
